Description: Israel struck Iran's key natural gas field, an energy lifeline for the country, leading to a major regional escalation.
Iran launched retaliatory missile strikes against Qatari and Saudi energy infrastructure following the attack on South Pars.
An Iranian missile attack struck Israel's Haifa refinery, causing damage to essential infrastructure.
Iran hit a refinery in Kuwait as part of a wave of attacks on Gulf energy sites.
A second missile attack on the Haifa refinery caused a fire and prompted a one-week ultimatum from Donald Trump.
Iran struck a major gas field in the United Arab Emirates in retaliation for intensifying Israeli strikes.
US and Israeli forces carried out a powerful strike on Iran's largest petrochemical facility in southwestern Iran.
The IRGC confirmed an overnight attack on Saudi Arabia's Jubail petrochemical hub following strikes on Iranian facilities.
The Israeli army targeted and struck a petrochemical complex in the city of Shiraz, Iran.
A major attack, allegedly involving UAE Mirage jets, struck the refinery on Lavan Island hours after a US-brokered ceasefire began.

Facility: Energy facilities in Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, and UAE
Description: Iran launched retaliatory strikes against energy infrastructure in several Gulf states following the post-ceasefire attack on the Lavan refinery.
